title: Blue Spot Tools 15305 9PCE Long Arm Torx Key Set (T10-T50)
features: Manufactured from chrome vanadium for increased durability
Black oxide coating to increase corrosion resistance

description: The BlueSpot 9PCE Long Arm Torx Key Set (T10-T50) is manufactured from chrome vanadium steel for increased durability. The keys feature a black oxide coating to aid corrosion resistance and the extra length enables your get a greater amount of torque onto the fastener you are working on. The tips are also chamfered for ease of entry.
